title: Separate image-to-video and text-to-video from video models?
description: Split the combined WAN 2.2 video model (t2v + i2v) into two dedicated models: 'Wan 2.2 T2V Smooth' (text-to-video only) and 'Wan 2.2 I2V Smooth' (image-to-video only, includes the PainterI2Vadvanced custom node). DECISION UPDATE: the combined 'Wan 2.2 Smooth' model was REMOVED entirely (not kept) — it no longer makes sense to ship both. Both new models keep multi-stage (loraStages high/low). Implemented in js/data/modelConstants/models.js (no new DEPS, no new workflows — reuse existing t2v/i2v checkpoints + Wan22_t2v.json/Wan22_i2v.json). Removal verified safe: no hardcoded 'wan-22' id in routes/services/components; persisted selection + modelSettings self-heal via resolveActiveModel fallback. Versioning (op-keyed, unchanged), provisioning (dep-flag per-model node gate), sidecar .meta (modelId generic), and project.json modelSettings (per-model queue → updateProjectJson) all verified id-generic. Also fixed model-card preview aspect: video previews now auto-size to the clip's real ratio (i2v portrait, t2v landscape) via loadedmetadata in MpiInstalledDisplay; mediaRatio threaded through MpiModelManager mounts. Breaking change documented in docs/releases/UNRELEASED.md. VALIDATION PENDING: full generation tests across both models + multi-stage + old-project load.
